title: Pag`iy'el #6295
definition:
Pagiel = "event of God"

 1) son of Ocran and chief of the tribe of Asher at the time of the exodus
nasbUsage:
Definition: Pagiel = "event of God"

 1) son of Ocran and chief of the tribe of Asher at the time of the exodus

    NASB:  occurrence of God, an Asherite
